    Welcome to Our Elementary School

    Shri Krishna Mohan Bandyopadhyay has been a social worker in the locality of Majhergram Panchayet, especially for the village, Humania Pota. He and his wife Smt Arati Rani Devi were highly involved in carrying the legacy of the family by establishing appropriate education centers in the village.

    Shri Krishna Mohan’s forefathers have brought the first primary school in the village, in the year 1903. In his earnest desire, Krishna Mohan took the lead to establish a high school in the village, in the year 1983. Today, the current generation of Bandyopadhyay family intends to carry the legacy of their forefathers and thus about to establish a pre-primary English medium School in the village. It would be a boon for the children of the area in deciding their future.
